name: stitch
title: Stitch (Google)
description: MCP manifest for Stitch (Google). Use the official MCP URL and prefer API Key or OAuth via gcloud.

api_key.note: Persistent API keys are created in Stitch Settings. Use when your tool accepts a key in headers or env.

oauth2.note: Obtain token via `gcloud auth application-default print-access-token`. Tokens are short-lived (~1 hour).

endpoints.name: mcp_root
endpoints.description: MCP root endpoint (POST). Clients should POST MCP requests here.

notes: Preferred MCP URL: https://stitch.googleapis.com/mcp. Use `X-Goog-Api-Key` for API keys or set `STITCH_ACCESS_TOKEN` for bearer tokens. Do not commit credentials.
